title: Braains.io Original
gamePlayInstructions:
WASD or Arrow Keys - Movement keys
G - Drop item
E - Pick up item
B - Buy items as a human
Z - Teleport to Spawn as a zombie
Mouse Left Click - Use item
J/U/I/O - Text emotes
When logged in:
Enter - Chat
M - Missions panel

potatoGun.description:
Shoots powerful potatoes for 25 points each and also moves heavy objects!
- 10% chance to be rare!
potatoGun.name: Potato Gun

PBOMyFpPs8.description:
Use the Swordfish to move heavy objects and perhaps grab them!
- 10% chance to be rare!
PBOMyFpPs8.name: Swordfish

6T5fWSolir.description:
Pill allows you to lower your chance to become one of the first zombies!
You can stack the effect up to 5 times!
The immunity effect lasts only 1 round!
6T5fWSolir.name: Pill

nidc3swP0c.description:
Use the Baseball Bat to move heavy objects!
- 10% chance to be rare!
nidc3swP0c.name: Baseball Bat

d73qo6nov5.name: Shotgun

Use the Shotgun for running away and pushing objects!
Cooldown 2 seconds.

The Drumstick is very thick!
- Increase gainz by 25%
- 5% chance to be rare!
- 0.2% chance to be ultra rare!

This Mystic Crystal has numberous of magic powers!
+50% speed
+35% Camera

- Blow up players around you [Cooldown 2 seconds]

zwAoerFxEw.description: Shoots powerful baked potatoes for 20 points each and also moves heavy objects!

7PnVjGFlfv.description: The Stacked Dynamite is complete obliteration!

g2XpxVVdEp.description:
Feel the power of the TONIC zombie!

On pre-outbreak [Before 10s left] : Disguise you as an human and transform you to TONIC zombie soon!

On pre-outbreak [After 10s left] : Transform you to sick with the fast movement speed, and guaranteed to be TONIC zombie!

On outbreak period : Transform you to TONIC zombie INSTANTLY!

*This item RESET YOUR SCORE when the item is in effect!!
g2XpxVVdEp.name: Tonic zombie potion

then.message: Power of TONIC zombie will be in effect soon !!

else.message: The TONIC potion is already in effect!

then.message: Feel the POWER of the TONIC zombie NOW !!
You are a zombie now! If you're stuck, press [Z] to teleport to spawn position

else.message: You can use this item only on outbreak, or pre-outbreak period!

actions.comment: 100% chance for tonic potion to choose you as a zombie.
If immunity (0-5) + afkvalue (0-6) + Natural immunity (0-inf) lesser or equal this value, make them red zombie.

then.comment: If it's "Zombie Party" special round or number of players <= 10, guaruntee the chance for sick to mutate.

actions.comment: If random number equal that value, we decide by immunity, afk value and natural immunity.

textB.textB:
,

Welcome to Braains.io!
[H] to open this again

Controls:
[WASD] or [Arrow Keys] to move
[Mouse] to rotate
[Left Click] to use item
[B] to buy item
[E] to pickup item on ground
[G] to drop item from your hotbar to the ground
[Z] to teleport to spawn (for zombies only, 60s cooldown)
[/tag tagname] to add tag (replace tagname with your tag) *Disabled for this time being
[/removetag] to remove your tag
[/s] to check server status
[/winrate] to check winrate data

You must be logged in to use the following features:
[ENTER] to open and send chat message
[M] to open the current server's missions (earn moddCoins!)

You can register an account by click the top left 'MENU' button and clicking 'Login'.
Need help? Click the Discord icon below the 'Play' button!
Disable Ads-Blocker for more reward at the end of the round!

Badges (next to name): ⭐ = Verified Youtuber, 🔪 = Moderator, 🔨 = Developer, 🖌️= Artist

Have fun!
— Devs

[ENTER] to open and send chat message
[M] to open the current server's missions (earn moddCoins!)

You can register an account by click the top left 'MENU' button and clicking 'Login'.
Need help? Click the Discord icon below the 'Play' button!
Disable Ads-Blocker for more reward at the end of the round!

Have fun!
— Devs

customInputModalMessage.default:
Command panel
Mod+ Commands
# [message] – Private chat between staff members.
/nick [username] – Adjust your username.
/viewcmdlogs – Staff command log.
/sp [player] – Select a player (or right-click them).
/swm [message] – Send a warning message to the selected player.
/viewlogs – View logs of the selected player.
/watch – Toggle spectator mode.
/reveal – Reveal in-game staff.
Head Moderator+ Commands
/selectnick [username] – Set selected player username.
/resetcmdlogs - Remove command logs generated previously.
/resetwin – Reset winrate record on this server.
/shout [message] – Display text overlay to all players.
/zombie party [value] – Set special round to "Zombie Party" by designated value of rounds.
/double gainz [value] – Set special round to "Double Gainz" by designated value of rounds.
/crazy debris [value] – Set special round to "Crazy Debris" by designated value of rounds.
/juke-only [value] – Set special round to "Juke-Only" by designated value of rounds.
/extra items [value] – Set special round to "Extra Items" by designated value of rounds.
/zombie apocalypse [value] – Set special round to "Zombie apocalypse" by designated value of rounds.
/randomizespecialrounds [value] – Randomize "all special round types" (excl.Gazillionx Gains) by designated value of rounds.
/lastsurvivorevent [on/off] - Disable/Enable last survivor event.
/resetspecialrounds – End the special round event generated by this command.
/save [off/on] - Disable/Enable highscore saving feature on current server.
/checksave - Check highscore saving state for this server.
/setzoom [value] - Set your zoom to designated value.
Dev+ Commands
/setmyscore [value] – Set only your score to designated value.
/setscore [value] – Set all players score to designated value.
/addscore [value] – Add all players score by designated value.
/deductscore [value] – Deduct all players score by designated value.
/gazillion [value] – Set special round to "Gazillionx Gains" by designated value of rounds.
/shrekoverride [off/on] – Override behavior of "shrek score" and "shrek threshold" by this command.
/shrekscore [value] – Set "shrek score" to desianged value on the next round.
/shrekthreshold [value] – Set "shrek score" required to make the "shrek frenzy" on the next round.
/setroundtimer [value] - Override round timer to designated value.
/payout [value] - Payout moddcoin to selected player by designated value.
/cleardroppeditems - Clear dropped items on the ground for this server.
/setgainz [value] - Set gainz multiplier on the current round by designated value.
/item [itemname] - Give designated item to all players.
/firerate - Set currently held weapon cooldown to 0.02s.
/clearhelditems - Destroy currently equipping weapon for all players.
/revokeitem - Destroy currently equipping weapon for selected player.
/swapteam - Swap the selected player team to opposite side.
/quantity - Uncap the max ammo for currently held item.
/boxify - Transform selected player to a "box", or transform from "box" to "human".
/bedify - Transform selected player to a "bed", or transform from "bed" to "human".

Please type the command in the box below :

allMissionsNames.default: [" 20 - First to get 50k score. "," 20 - First to be the Last Survivor. "," 5 - First to get a Rare Item."," 5 - First to Kill a Mystic Crystal Holder. "," 20 - First to obtain 2 rare items in a single round."," 20 - First to survive 8 rounds in a row. "," 20 - First to reach a kill streak of 6. "]

settings.menuHTML:
{{ loginForm }}
{{ sideMenu }}
{{#if isUserLoggedIn }} {{ friendsPanel }} {{/if}}

Instructions

{{#unless isMobile}}
WASD or Arrow Keys - Movement keys
G - Drop item
E - Pick up item
B - Buy items as a human
Z - Teleport to Spawn as a zombie
Mouse Left Click - Use item
I and hold - Emote
When logged in:
Enter - Chat
M - Missions panel
{{else}}
Left Joystick - Movement
Right Joystick - Rotate
- Pick up item
- Drop item
- Buy items as a human
- Teleport to Spawn as a zombie
- Use item
When logged in:
Top-left chat button - Chat
{{/unless}}

Featured Video

Created by {{gameDetails.creator.name}}

{{ playForm }}
Enable Hardware Acceleration in your browser to get better performance, visit here for more information

{{ coinShop }}
Join to participate in community challenges for coins and help devs improve the game
